title: Pulsar Station
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Pulsar}}
The '''Pulsar Station''' was a [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]-like system domination weapon planned by the [[Ciutric Hegemony]].

==Description==
The Pulsar Station was a drastically scaled-down version of the original Death Star battle stations, inspired by the way the [[Palpatine/Legends|Emperor]] utilized the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]—for the destruction of [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]].

Along its equatorial plane were a number of [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity-well generators]] to halt all [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] traffic in and out of local space. The [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] was also scaled down and numerous superlaser emplacements were installed, each capable of destroying a [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]]. Its capabilities were rounded off by half a dozen [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] [[Fighter wing/Legends|wings]] and smaller anti-ship weapons.

==History==
Though detailed schematics for the station were created, there were never any intentions to implement such a weapon, which was supposedly being built into the moon of [[Distna]] in the [[Corvis Minor system/Legends|Corvis Minor system]]. The designs were allowed to fall into the hands of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] at the [[Battle of Liinade III]]. The Pulsar Station was nothing more than an elaborate charade by ex-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Ysanne Isard]] to lure [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to aid her in her quest to destroy her [[Ysanne Isard (clone)|rogue clone]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Prince-Admiral]] [[Delak Krennel]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]'' {{Mo}}
